Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • configuration - (Optional) (Updatable) The WebLogic domain configuration.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • display_name - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • middleware_type - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • weblogic_version - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
